Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class ImpE

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerInputs.HypothesisReasoner
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.ImpHypothesisReasoner
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.ImpE
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasoner, IVersionedReasoner
public class ImpE extends ImpHypothesisReasoner implements IVersionedReasoner
Generates a proof rule for modus ponens for a given implicative hypothesis.

Proof rules generated by this reasoner are not goal dependent.

    • getVersion

      public int getVersion()
      Description copied from interface: IVersionedReasoner
      Returns the current version of this reasoner.

      The version number is incremented whenever the reasoner code changes.

      Specified by:
      getVersion in interface IVersionedReasoner
      Returns:
      a non-negative integer
